summary: Motion Language (STEP 6) testing completed. All 6 animations verified: (1) Card hover lift - CSS transition on .shadow-card with translateY(-2px) on hover, (2) Modal entrance - animate-slide-up-full md:animate-modal-enter classes on LeadDetailModal, (3) Button press - button:active scale(0.97) in index.css, (4) Toast slide-in - animate-toast-in class in Toaster options with toastSlideIn keyframe, (5) Landing page reveals - duration-slow ease-standard classes on 7 sections, (6) Timing tokens - instant(80ms), slow(400ms), standard/spring easings in tailwind.config.js. All animations wrapped in prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference media query.
critical_code_review_comments: Animation 1 (Card hover): .shadow-card has transition for transform and box-shadow, hover state adds translateY(-2px) - verified in index.css lines 540-547
Animation 2 (Modal entrance): LeadDetailModal uses 'animate-slide-up-full md:animate-modal-enter' - verified in LeadDetailModal.tsx line 538
Animation 3 (Button press): button:active:not(:disabled) { transform: scale(0.97) } - verified in index.css lines 552-555
Animation 4 (Toast slide-in): Toaster uses className 'animate-toast-in' with toastSlideIn keyframe - verified in App.tsx line 60 and tailwind.config.js lines 296-299
Animation 5 (Landing reveals): 7 sections use 'duration-slow ease-standard' classes - verified in LandingPageV2.tsx
Animation 6 (Timing tokens): transitionDuration (instant:80ms, fast:150ms, base:250ms, slow:400ms) and transitionTimingFunction (standard, spring) - verified in tailwind.config.js lines 235-244
All animations properly wrapped in @media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference) - verified in index.css
context_for_next_testing_agent: Motion language animations are CSS-only. Modal animation uses responsive classes (mobile: animate-slide-up-full, desktop: md:animate-modal-enter). All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion. Timing tokens available: duration-instant(80ms), duration-fast(150ms), duration-base(250ms), duration-slow(400ms), ease-standard, ease-spring.

Login_Flow.details: Login with bookingtest@test.com / password123 redirects to /dashboard

Dashboard_Loading.details: Dashboard loads with Active Commissions, lead cards visible, no console errors

Animation_1_Card_Hover.details: CSS verified: .shadow-card has transition property, :hover adds translateY(-2px) and enhanced box-shadow. Wrapped in prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference

Animation_2_Modal_Entrance.details: LeadDetailModal has classes 'animate-slide-up-full md:animate-modal-enter'. modalEnter keyframe uses spring easing cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)

Animation_3_Button_Press.details: CSS verified: button:active:not(:disabled) { transform: scale(0.97); transition: transform 80ms } in index.css

Animation_4_Toast_SlideIn.details: Toaster component uses toastOptions.className='animate-toast-in'. toastSlideIn keyframe defined in tailwind.config.js

Animation_5_Landing_Reveals.details: 7 sections in LandingPageV2.tsx use 'duration-slow ease-standard' classes for scroll-reveal animations

Animation_6_Timing_Tokens.details: Tailwind config has: instant(80ms), fast(150ms), base(250ms), slow(400ms) durations + standard/spring easings

No_Console_Errors.details: No console errors on landing page or dashboard (excluding expected 401 for unauthenticated resources)
